test_cases.description: Verifies correct Zustand store pattern with TypeScript interface and actions
test_cases.input: Create a Zustand store for a shopping cart with add, remove, and clear actions.

test_cases.description: Verifies correct TanStack Query mutation pattern with cache invalidation
test_cases.input: Use TanStack Query to create a hook for creating and deleting products, updating the list cache.

test_cases.description: Verifies correct optimistic update pattern with rollback on error
test_cases.input: Implement optimistic updates when updating a product name with TanStack Query.
